stories.title: Solak picks the 10 most improved units through off...
stories.summary: Let's stack the 10 biggest upgrades at specific positions since the end of last season, including three teams' linebacker units.

stories.title: Let's evaluate every NFC team's offseason: 16 team...
stories.summary: We're picking out the offseason's highs and lows for every NFC team.

stories.title: Sources: Magic near deal to hire Spurs' Sweeney
stories.summary: The Orlando Magic are finalizing a deal to hire San Antonio Spurs associate head coach Sean Sweeney as the franchise's new head coach, sources told ESPN on Friday.

stories.title: Source: Steelers assistant fired for misconduct
stories.summary: The Steelers have fired senior special teams assistant Derius Swinton II for a violation of club policy, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Djokovic's 25th Slam bid ends with loss to Fonseca...
stories.summary: Novak Djokovic's latest quest for a record 25th Grand Slam ended with a defeat to Joao Fonseca in the third round of the French Open on Friday.
